name: Human-Wave Tactics
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if your Level 2 or lower Normal Monster(s) was destroyed by battle this turn: Special Summon Level 2 or lower Normal Monsters from your Deck, equal to the number of your Level 2 or lower Normal Monsters destroyed by battle this turn.
eff: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if your Level 2 or lower Normal Monster(s) was destroyed by battle this turn: Special Summon Level 2 or lower Normal Monsters from your Deck, equal to the number of your Level 2 or lower Normal Monsters destroyed by battle this turn.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows
